options.name: --billing-account
options.description: The billing account id to use.

options.name: --costApiBaseAddress
options.description:
The base address for the Cost API. Defaults to
https://management.azure.com/

options.name: --debug
options.description:
Increase logging verbosity to show all debug
logs.

options.name: --enrollment-account
options.description: The enrollment account id to use.

options.name: --filter
options.description:
Filter the output by the specified properties. Defaults to
no filtering and can be multiple values.

options.name: --from
options.description:
The start date to use for the costs. Defaults to the first
day of the previous month.

options.name: --includeTags
options.description:
Include Tags from the selected dimension. The option is
used for DailyCost report and output to Json, JsonC or Csv. Valid only for
DailyCost report and output to Json, JsonC or Csv. Ignored in other reports and
output formats.

options.name: --metric
options.description:
The metric to use for the costs. Defaults to ActualCost.
(ActualCost, AmortizedCost)

options.name: --others-cutoff
options.description:
The number of items to show before collapsing the rest into
an 'Others' item.

options.name: --output
options.description:
The output format to use. Defaults to Console (Console,
Json, JsonC, Text, Markdown, Csv)

options.name: --priceApiBaseAddress
options.description:
The base address for the Price API. Defaults to
https://prices.azure.com/

options.name: --query
options.description:
JMESPath query string, applicable for the Json output only.
See http://jmespath.org/ for more information and examples.

options.name: --resource-group
options.description:
The resource group to scope the request to. Need to be used
in combination with the subscription id.

options.name: --skipHeader
options.description:
Skip header creation for specific output formats. Useful
when appending the output from multiple runs into one file. Defaults to
false.

options.name: --subscription
options.description:
The subscription id to use. Will try to fetch the active id
if not specified.

options.name: --timeframe
options.description:
The timeframe to use for the costs. Defaults to
BillingMonthToDate. When set to Custom, specify the from and to dates using the
--from and --to options

options.name: --to
options.description:
The end date to use for the costs. Defaults to the current
date.

options.name: --useUSD
options.description:
Force the use of USD for the currency. Defaults to false to
use the currency returned by the API.
